center.name: Handbook of Australian, New Zealand and Antarctic Birds
center.summary: Handbook of Australian, New Zealand and Antarctic Birds是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括笑翠鳥，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The territorial call is a distinctive laugh that is often delivered by several birds at the same time, and is widely used as a stock sound effect in situations that involve a jungle setting. The laughing kookaburra is native to eastern mainland Australia, but has also been introduced to parts of New Zealand, Tasmania, and Western Australia.{{cite book | title=Handbook of Australian, New Zealand and Antarctic Birds
